action.reasoning: Observation: baseline macro_f1=0.2944, train_acc=23%, very high loss (78.93). Class weights using linear inverse frequency are too extreme, causing instability. Analysis: Need sqrt inverse frequency weights, better augmentation (RandomResizedCrop), LR warmup, and longer training. Decision: Rewrite train.py with improvements, train 10 epochs (~90 min), submit eval.
